name: LOWENFIELD v. PHELPS, SECRETARY, LOUISIANA DEPARTMENT OF CORRECTIONS, et al.
question_presented: Memorization-check set: predict the Supreme Court's disposition in LOWENFIELD v. PHELPS, SECRETARY, LOUISIANA DEPARTMENT OF CORRECTIONS, et al. (484 U.S. 231, 1987 Term).
facts_summary: Historical case in the memorization-check arm. By design, only the case name, citation, and term are provided — this arm measures recall of memorized outcomes, not reasoning.
